summary: Test suite covers main retention policies and dry-run mode but lacks edge case rigor. Major gaps: no tests for stdin input, empty artifact lists, invalid argument values (non-numeric, negative), boundary conditions, or all-three-policies-combined scenario. Fixture files are referenced but not provided, making full verification impossible. Integration tests (run-act.sh) use hardcoded expected values derived manually from fixtures, creating brittleness rather than generative logic. cleanup.bats assumes specific artifact names and sizes in fixtures without documenting the schema. Good: clear separation into unit/integration/structure tests, actionlint validation, proper setup/teardown isolation. Needs: documented fixture schema, generative expected-value computation, error-case testing for malformed inputs, comprehensive edge case coverage.
